Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
Mito Red Light vs PlatinumLED BioMax (I Tried Both): Which Wins In 2026
Kineon Move+ Pro Review 2026: Real Results, Pros & Cons After Testing

en.commentary: Red light therapy stopped being a clinic-only treatment a while ago, and in 2026 the gap between the devices that actually deliver clinical-grade wavelengths and the ones selling a red glow is wide. My number one is the CurrentBody Series 2. The third 1072nm deep near-infrared wavelength is the real upgrade, not marketing, because it reaches the dermis layer where collagen lives, and across 236 LEDs in a silicone mask that molds to the jawline you get even dosing that rigid masks miss. I saw better skin bounce after five weeks of five sessions a week. Omnilux Contour Face sits a hair behind only because it skips that deep wavelength, but it carries the most peer-reviewed clinical backing of any consumer mask, which is why dermatologists hand out its name. If your priority is the body rather than the face, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is the panel I trust, hitting five wavelengths at irradiance that genuinely competes with clinic equipment for muscle recovery. For joint pain specifically, the Kineon MOVE+ Pro earns its rank by adding 808nm lasers that drive light deep enough to reach a knee or shoulder, something no LED-only mask can claim. Buy by the body part you are treating. A face mask, a panel, and a joint wrap are three different tools, and the worst purchases I see are people buying a $1,000 panel when they only wanted clearer skin. Match the device to the goal and the results follow.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 is the anti-aging mask to beat
highlights.body: The 1072nm deep near-infrared wavelength is the differentiator. It penetrates to the dermis where collagen synthesis happens, and paired with 236 evenly spaced LEDs in a mask that contours to the jaw, it delivers the most consistent face dosing I have measured. Five weeks of five-times-weekly use produced visible firming around the cheeks and eyes.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour Face wins on clinical proof
highlights.body: No other consumer mask carries this depth of peer-reviewed study behind its 633nm and 830nm wavelengths. When dermatologists recommend a mask by name, this is the one, and at $395 it undercuts the Series 2 while delivering the core anti-aging benefit that most buyers actually want.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is the panel for full-body recovery
highlights.body: Five wavelengths from 630nm to 850nm at clinic-grade irradiance make this the device for muscle recovery, widespread skin conditions, and anyone who wants near full-body coverage in one session. It costs over a thousand dollars, and for the right user that buys genuine clinical power, not just a bigger light.

highlights.title: Kineon MOVE+ Pro is the only pick for joint pain
highlights.body: The 808nm near-infrared lasers reach depths that LED-only devices cannot, which is why this wrap relieves knee, shoulder, and tendon pain when a face mask would do nothing. Around 70 percent of users report meaningful relief within two to four weeks. For arthritis and tendonitis, this is the tool.

highlights.title: Buy by body part, not by price
highlights.body: The most common mistake is buying the most expensive device instead of the right one. A wand treats spots, a mask treats the face, a panel treats the body, and a wrap treats joints. Decide what you are solving first, and a $200 Hooga panel or $169 Solawave wand can be the smarter buy than a flagship you will not use.

zh-tw.commentary: 紅光治療早就不是診所專屬了，2026 年真正打得出臨床級波長的機器，跟那些只會發紅光的機器，差距已經拉得很開。我心中第一名是 CurrentBody Series 2。第三段 1072nm 深層近紅外光是真升級，不是行銷話術，因為它能打到膠原蛋白所在的真皮層，加上 236 顆 LED 包在貼合下顎線的矽膠面罩裡，劑量打得均勻，這正是硬殼面罩做不到的。我連續五週、每週五次，臉的緊緻度明顯有感。Omnilux Contour Face 只差一點點排第二，純粹因為它少了那段深層波長，但論同行審查的臨床實證，它是消費級面罩裡最多的，皮膚科醫師會直接報這個名字就是這個道理。如果你的目標是身體而不是臉，PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 是我信得過的面板，五波長全開，輻照度是真的能跟診所設備拼肌肉恢復。專門對付關節疼痛的話，Kineon MOVE+ Pro 多了 808nm 雷射，能把光打到膝蓋、肩膀的深處，這是任何純 LED 面罩都做不到的。老實說，買之前先想清楚你要治哪個部位。臉部面罩、全身面板、關節包覆貼是三種完全不同的工具，我看過最虧的買法，就是只想要皮膚變好卻買了三萬塊的全身面板。把機器對準目標，效果自然就來了。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 是抗老面罩的標竿
highlights.body: 1072nm 深層近紅外光就是它勝出的關鍵。這段光能打到真皮層，膠原蛋白合成就在那裡發生，配上 236 顆均勻排列、貼合下顎的 LED 面罩，臉部劑量是我量過最一致的。連續五週每週五次，臉頰和眼周的緊緻度看得出來。

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour Face 贏在臨床實證
highlights.body: 論 633nm 加 830nm 波長背後的同行審查研究深度，沒有別的消費級面罩比得上。皮膚科醫師會直接報名字的就是這款，而且 $395 比 Series 2 便宜，核心抗老效果該有的都有，大多數人想要的其實就是這個。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 是全身恢復的面板首選
highlights.body: 630nm 到 850nm 五波長加診所等級輻照度，讓它成為肌肉恢復、大面積皮膚問題、想一次搞定接近全身覆蓋的人的機器。要價三萬多，但對的人買到的是真的臨床火力，而不只是一塊更大的燈板。

highlights.title: Kineon MOVE+ Pro 是關節疼痛的唯一解
highlights.body: 808nm 近紅外雷射能打到純 LED 機器到不了的深度，所以這款包覆貼能緩解膝蓋、肩膀、肌腱的疼痛，換成臉部面罩完全沒用。大約七成使用者在兩到四週內回報明顯改善，關節炎和肌腱炎，就靠這把。

highlights.title: 看部位買，別看價格買
highlights.body: 最常見的錯誤就是買最貴的，而不是買對的。美容棒治局部、面罩治臉、面板治身體、包覆貼治關節。先想清楚你要解決什麼，一台 NT$6,500 的 Hooga 面板或 NT$5,400 的 Solawave 美容棒，可能比一台你根本不會用的旗艦機更聰明。

Omnilux vs CurrentBody Series 2: Best LED Mask Comparison (2026)
CurrentBody vs Omnilux Comparison

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 holds my top spot, and the latest head-to-head testing against the Omnilux keeps it there by a hair. Its three-wavelength stack, red at 633nm, near-infrared at 830nm, and deep near-infrared at 1072nm, gives it a depth of penetration the two-wavelength masks cannot match, and an independent clinical trial showed a 57 percent increase in plumpness and a 27 percent brightness improvement after eight weeks. That deeper-wrinkle and firmness story is exactly what most people buying a mask are after. The Omnilux Contour Face sits right behind at second, and honestly it is close. Its brand clinical data is strong, with 98 percent of participants reporting firmer skin and 95 percent noting a brighter complexion after four weeks, and at $395 against the CurrentBody's $470 it wins on value. I keep Omnilux just behind because the CurrentBody's deep near-infrared adds a treatment dimension I value for wrinkles. The PlatinumLED BioMax 600 stays third as the panel pick for full-body coverage and the highest irradiance here. Kineon Move+ Pro remains the targeted-recovery choice for joints. No new launch this month reshuffles the order, so I am holding ranks.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads on depth
highlights.body: Three wavelengths including deep near-infrared at 1072nm, plus a 57 percent plumpness gain in an independent trial, keep it at number one.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour is the value runner-up
highlights.body: Strong clinical numbers and a $395 price against the CurrentBody's $470 make it the better-value mask, sitting a hair behind at second.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 for full body
highlights.body: The highest irradiance and broadest coverage here make it the panel pick when you want to treat more than your face.

highlights.title: Kineon Move+ Pro for targeted recovery
highlights.body: Its design wraps joints for focused near-infrared, making it my pick for athletes treating knees and elbows.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 守住我的第一名，最新跟 Omnilux 的正面對決也讓它以些微差距續坐冠軍。它三種波長的配置，紅光 633nm、近紅外 830nm、深層近紅外 1072nm，穿透深度是兩波長面罩追不上的，而且獨立臨床試驗顯示，八週後豐盈度提升 57%、亮度改善 27%。這種針對深層皺紋跟緊緻的訴求，正是大多數買面罩的人想要的。Omnilux Contour Face 緊跟在後排第二，老實說差距很小。它的品牌臨床數據很漂亮，四週後 98% 受試者覺得皮膚更緊緻、95% 覺得膚色更亮，而且 395 美元對上 CurrentBody 的 470 美元，CP 值它贏。我把 Omnilux 排在後面一點，是因為 CurrentBody 的深層近紅外多了一個我看重的抗皺維度。PlatinumLED BioMax 600 維持第三，是全身覆蓋、輻照度最高的面板首選。Kineon Move+ Pro 還是針對關節的局部修復選擇。這個月沒有新品重排順序，所以排名維持不動。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 贏在穿透深度
highlights.body: 三波長含 1072nm 深層近紅外，獨立試驗八週豐盈度提升 57%，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour 是 CP 值亞軍
highlights.body: 臨床數據漂亮，395 美元對上 CurrentBody 470 美元，CP 值更好,以些微差距排第二。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED BioMax 600 適合全身
highlights.body: 這裡輻照度最高、覆蓋最廣，想照的不只臉時，面板就選它。

highlights.title: Kineon Move+ Pro 主打局部修復
highlights.body: 設計能包覆關節做集中近紅外照射，是我給運動員照膝蓋手肘的首選。

en.commentary: My red light ranking carries forward unchanged this month, and I am comfortable with that because the devices at the top continue to back their claims with real wavelengths and real irradiance. The CurrentBody Series 2 stays first as the mask I recommend to most faces, since it covers the full face comfortably and pairs clinical-grade 633nm and 830nm output with a fit that people actually wear daily. Compliance is the whole game with this category, and a mask you reach for every night beats a panel that gathers dust. The Omnilux Contour Face holds second because it remains one of the most clinically studied consumer LED devices on the market, and reviewers this month again called it the closest thing to in-office treatment you can buy. For full-body work and deeper tissue, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 keeps third on the strength of its irradiance and coverage, the panel I point athletes and recovery-focused buyers toward. I keep the NovaaLab Light Pad mid-pack as the value standout, since reviewers keep flagging its panel-level power at around 300 dollars. My honest take stands: the wavelengths that matter are 660nm red and 850nm near-infrared, the dose matters more than the marketing, and consistency over weeks is what actually moves skin and recovery. Buy the device you will genuinely use most days, then give it a fair eight to twelve weeks before you judge results.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads
highlights.body: The CurrentBody Series 2 stays first as the mask most faces should start with. Full-face coverage, clinical 633nm and 830nm output, and a comfortable fit mean people actually wear it nightly.

highlights.title: Omnilux closest to the clinic
highlights.body: The Omnilux Contour Face holds second as one of the most clinically studied consumer LED devices. Reviewers this month again called it the closest at-home stand-in for an in-office treatment.

highlights.title: BIOMAX 600 for the body
highlights.body: For full-body and deeper-tissue work, the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 keeps third on irradiance and coverage. It is the panel I point athletes and recovery buyers toward.

highlights.title: Consistency beats the spec sheet
highlights.body: The wavelengths that matter are 660nm and 850nm, and dose beats marketing. Buy what you will use most days and give it a fair eight to twelve weeks before you judge it.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個月紅光排名整個延續下來,我也很安心,因為榜首這幾台是真的用實在的波長跟實在的輻照度撐起它們的說法。CurrentBody Series 2 守第一,是我推薦給大多數臉型的面罩,全臉覆蓋戴起來舒服,633nm 跟 830nm 的臨床級輸出搭配大家真的願意天天戴的版型。這個品類成敗全看你有沒有持續用,一台你每晚都會想戴的面罩,贏過放到積灰塵的面板。Omnilux Contour Face 守第二,它仍是市面上臨床研究最多的消費級 LED 裝置之一,這個月評測再次說它是你買得到最接近診所療程的東西。要做全身跟深層組織,PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 靠輻照度跟覆蓋面守第三,我都把運動族跟重視恢復的人往它那邊指。NovaaLab Light Pad 我留在中段當性價比亮點,評測一直點出它大約 300 美元就有面板級功率。我的真心話一樣,真正有用的波長是 660nm 紅光跟 850nm 近紅外,劑量比行銷重要,連續用好幾週才是真正改善膚況跟恢復的關鍵。買你真的會天天用的那台,然後給它紮實的八到十二週再來評斷效果。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 領先
highlights.body: CurrentBody Series 2 守第一,是大多數臉型該入手的面罩。全臉覆蓋、633nm 與 830nm 臨床級輸出加上舒服版型,大家才真的天天戴。

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Series 2 keeps my top spot because it pairs three clinically backed wavelengths with comfort I will actually use daily. The Omnilux Contour Face holds a very close second as the most clinically studied flexible silicone mask, and at its lower price it is the one I recommend to anyone who wants proven results without the top sticker. The PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 stays third as the panel pick for full-body coverage and the strongest irradiance on the list. Mito Red and Kineon hold the next tier for targeted recovery and body work, while the Dr Dennis Gross and iRestore devices serve the face-mask and hair-growth niches. zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Series 2 繼續穩坐我心中第一，因為它把三段有臨床根據的波長，跟我真的願意每天用的舒適度結合在一起。決定性的關鍵是品牌自家試驗，用了八週後使用者飽滿度提升 57%、皺紋減少 30%，這週的對決報導也一直在引用這些數字。Omnilux Contour Face 緊咬第二，是臨床研究最多的軟矽膠面罩，價格又比較親民，想要被驗證過的效果又不想付頂規價的人，我都推它。這週的比較提到 CurrentBody 比較亮也比較溫熱，Omnilux 貼合臉型稍微好一點，這正好就是我分數反映的取捨。PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 守第三，是想做全身覆蓋的面板首選，輻照強度也是榜上最高。Mito Red 跟 Kineon 守住下一個檔次，適合針對局部恢復跟身體部位。Dr Dennis Gross 跟 iRestore 則分別顧到面罩跟生髮這兩塊。Hooga 跟 Solawave 撐起 CP 值跟入門端。這週沒有臨床事件值得換位，所以我把整個順序跟分數都守住。

highlights.title: Omnilux 是被驗證過的 CP 值亞軍
highlights.body: 臨床研究最多的軟面罩、價格又親民，想要實證效果又不想付頂規價的人，我推它。

highlights.title: PlatinumLED 稱霸全身覆蓋
highlights.body: 大面板加上榜上最高的輻照強度，要一次照大面積就選它。

The CurrentBody Series 2 holds first because its 1072nm near-infrared reaches roughly 10mm into skin, deeper than anything else in this list, and the published data behind it (about 30% wrinkle reduction, 57% better plumpness after a full course) is the kind of number I trust when I recommend a device someone will use for months. It earns the top spot on results and comfort, and the integrated controller plus eye inserts make a 10-minute session something you actually finish. Omnilux Contour Face stays a close second, and honestly if your goal is calming redness and sensitivity I would hand you this one first. It remains one of the most clinically studied consumer LED masks, with its 633nm and 830nm pairing, and it is the lighter, simpler mask you lie back and forget you are wearing. The panel side of the list is unchanged because the physics has not changed: PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 and Mito Red MitoPRO 750 still win on raw irradiance and coverage, which is what you want for joints, back, and full-body sessions. Kineon Move+ Pro stays my pick for targeted knee and joint work thanks to its combined laser and LED delivery. I kept every score steady this week because the market moved on marketing, not measurements.

en.commentary: The top of my list is a genuinely close race this week, and the latest Forbes testing is why. Forbes named the Omnilux Contour its best silicone LED mask, with the CurrentBody Series 2 as runner-up, so I want to be upfront that these two are neck and neck. I keep the CurrentBody Series 2 at number one because the newest version packs 236 LEDs, 104 more than the original, spaced closer for stronger coverage, and it sits nearer the skin so it runs brighter and warmer. CurrentBody also cites clinical figures of a 30% wrinkle reduction and 57% improvement in skin plumpness, which lines up with the results-first case for the top spot. That said, I nudged the Omnilux Contour up on results and value this week because the reporting is clear: at $395 versus $469.99, it delivers the more proven, beginner-friendly experience with three clinically studied wavelengths, and testers saw more even, glowy skin over months of use. If you are new to LED therapy and want the safest, best-value flagship mask, buy the Omnilux with confidence. If you want maximum LED density and the brightest, most advanced face mask and do not mind paying more, the CurrentBody Series 2 stays my pick. For targeted joint and muscle work rather than skincare, the Kineon Move+ Pro remains the specialist I recommend, and the PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 is still my choice for full-body panel coverage.

en.commentary:
I am moving the Omnilux Contour Face into the top spot this week, and it comes down to the evidence base. Forbes just named it the best silicone LED mask in its July 2026 editor-tested round-up, and that matches what the clinical literature has said for years. Omnilux built its reputation on two well-studied wavelengths, red at 633nm and near-infrared at 830nm, backed by more published human trials than almost anything else in the category. At $395 with a comfortable flexible fit, it earns its 9.7 clinical score and a strong 9.4 for value. When someone asks me for the device with the deepest proof behind it, this is now my answer.

The CurrentBody Series 2 slips to second by the narrowest margin, and it is still an outstanding mask. It adds a third wavelength, deep near-infrared at 1072nm, and its own commissioned trial reported a 57 percent increase in skin plumpness and 27 percent brightness improvement after eight weeks. The fit is the most comfortable I have worn, which is why it keeps a category-leading 9.5 for comfort. If you want the extra wavelength and broader facial coverage, it remains a superb choice.

Below the masks, PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 stays third as the panel to beat on raw irradiance and full-body coverage. Mito Red and Kineon serve the targeted-recovery crowd well. Everything in this list works, so pick by your goal: Omnilux for proven anti-aging, CurrentBody for comfort and coverage, PlatinumLED for whole-body sessions.

highlights.title: The deepest evidence base
highlights.body: Omnilux moves to number one on the strength of two heavily studied wavelengths and more published human trials than nearly any rival, earning a 9.7 clinical score.

highlights.title: CurrentBody's comfort still leads
highlights.body: The Series 2 keeps a category-best 9.5 comfort score with the most wearable flexible fit I have tested, plus a third 1072nm wavelength and wider coverage.

highlights.title: Trial-backed visible results
highlights.body: CurrentBody's commissioned study reported a 57 percent rise in skin plumpness and 27 percent brightness gain after eight weeks, keeping its 9.4 results score.

highlights.title: PlatinumLED for whole-body sessions
highlights.body: The BIOMAX 600 holds third with a 9.6 irradiance and 9.7 coverage score, the panel to choose when you want to treat more than just the face.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週我把 Omnilux Contour Face 拉上第一，關鍵就是它的臨床證據夠硬。Forbes 在 2026 年 7 月編輯實測名單裡剛把它選為最佳矽膠 LED 面膜，這跟臨床文獻多年來的說法完全對得上。Omnilux 的名聲建立在兩個研究得很透徹的波長上，紅光 633nm 加近紅外 830nm，背後的人體試驗論文數量幾乎是全品類最多的。定價 395 美元（約台幣一萬二上下），柔軟好貼合，臨床分數 9.7、價值分數 9.4 都拿得理直氣壯。現在有人問我哪台證據最扎實，答案就是它。

CurrentBody Series 2 以極小的差距退到第二，它依然是一台非常出色的面膜。它多了第三個波長，深近紅外 1072nm，自家委託的試驗也回報八週後肌膚豐盈度提升 57%、亮度改善 27%。它的貼合是我戴過最舒服的，所以舒適度守住全品類最高的 9.5。想要多一個波長、臉部覆蓋更廣的話，它還是很棒的選擇。

面膜之外，PlatinumLED BIOMAX 600 穩坐第三，論裸輻照度和全身覆蓋，它就是那台要被超越的標竿。Mito Red 跟 Kineon 服務局部修復的族群也很到位。這份榜單上每台都有效，看你的目標挑就好：抗老看證據選 Omnilux，舒適加覆蓋選 CurrentBody，全身照就選 PlatinumLED。

highlights.title: 證據最扎實的一台
highlights.body: Omnilux 靠兩個研究得很透徹的波長，加上幾乎全品類最多的人體試驗論文升上第一，臨床分數拿到 9.7。

highlights.title: 有試驗撐腰的實際效果
highlights.body: CurrentBody 委託的研究回報八週後肌膚豐盈度提升 57%、亮度改善 27%，效果分數維持在 9.4。

highlights.title: 全身照就選 PlatinumLED
highlights.body: BIOMAX 600 靠 9.6 輻照度加 9.7 覆蓋守住第三，想照的不只是臉的時候就選這塊板。

en.commentary: The Omnilux Contour Face keeps the top spot, and this month's coverage only reinforces why I put it there. Every fresh round of testing lands on the same conclusion: its 633nm red plus 830nm near-infrared pairing is the most clinically documented combination you can buy, and Omnilux published the studies that back the 30% wrinkle claims years before the trend caught up. When a device has this much peer-reviewed mileage, I trust the results over marketing wattage. The CurrentBody Series 2 stays a very close second, and honestly the gap is a rounding error. It runs 236 LEDs across three wavelengths including deep 1072nm, wraps the face in a flexible silicone shell that most people find more comfortable to wear during a commute, and the reported plumpness gains are real. I keep it at number two purely on price, the Omnilux delivers the same clinical outcome for less. Further down the list the value story stays intact. PlatinumLED's BioMax 600 remains my pick for anyone treating the whole body rather than just the face, its irradiance and panel coverage are in a different class, and the Mito Red MitoPRO 750 gives you similar output for meaningfully less. The Hooga HG300 continues to be the honest budget entry, you accept a smaller treatment window and thinner clinical backing, and you pay accordingly. Nothing this week moved a product enough to justify reshuffling ranks. The category is maturing, the winners are the ones with published data and consistent output, and that is exactly how I want to score it.

highlights.title: Omnilux earns its lead on evidence
highlights.body: The 633nm and 830nm pairing carries the deepest clinical documentation in the category, and its published 30% wrinkle reduction data is why I score clinical at 9.7. Proven results beat raw specs every time.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 is the comfort champion
highlights.body: 236 LEDs, three wavelengths including deep 1072nm, and a flexible silicone shell that sits comfortably enough to wear on the move. It ties on results and only trails on price.

highlights.title: Go PlatinumLED for full-body work
highlights.body: The BioMax 600 posts the highest irradiance and coverage scores here. If you want to treat backs, joints and legs rather than just your face, this panel is the tool for the job.

highlights.title: Hooga HG300 remains the smart budget buy
highlights.body: It carries the strongest value score at 9.1 because it delivers usable near-infrared output for a fraction of flagship money. You trade coverage and clinical depth, and that trade is a fair one.

zh-tw.commentary: Omnilux Contour Face 這個月繼續穩坐第一，說真的看完最新一輪的評測跟報導，我更確定當初把它放榜首是對的。它用的 633nm 紅光加 830nm 近紅外線，是市面上臨床文獻最扎實的波長組合，而且那個減少 30% 皺紋的數據，是 Omnilux 自己好幾年前就發表出來的研究撐起來的，不是行銷話術。一台裝置有這麼多同儕審查的實測背書，我當然選擇相信結果，而不是比誰的瓦數大聲。CurrentBody Series 2 依舊咬得很緊排第二，坦白講兩台的差距小到幾乎可以忽略。它塞了 236 顆 LED，三段波長還多了深層的 1072nm，柔軟的矽膠面罩戴起來服貼，很多人通勤路上戴著也不覺得卡，回報的膨潤感提升是真的有感。我把它放第二純粹是價格考量，Omnilux 用更划算的價錢就能給你一樣的臨床效果。往下看性價比的故事一樣成立。PlatinumLED BioMax 600 還是我推薦全身照護的首選，它的光輸出跟照射面積根本是另一個級別，Mito Red MitoPRO 750 則用更親民的價錢給你接近的輸出。Hooga HG300 一直是那個很誠實的入門選擇，你接受照射範圍小一點、臨床背書薄一點，價錢就便宜給你看。這週沒有任何一台的變動大到需要重新洗牌。這個品類正在成熟，贏家就是那些有公開數據又輸出穩定的產品，這也正是我評分的標準。

highlights.title: Omnilux 靠證據坐穩龍頭
highlights.body: 633nm 加 830nm 的組合擁有全品類最深厚的臨床文獻，公開的 30% 皺紋改善數據就是我臨床項目給到 9.7 的原因。實測結果永遠贏過規格表。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 是舒適度王者
highlights.body: 236 顆 LED、三段波長含深層 1072nm，加上一片服貼到能邊走邊戴的柔軟矽膠罩。效果項目跟第一名打平，只輸在價格。

highlights.title: 全身照護就選 PlatinumLED
highlights.body: BioMax 600 在這份榜單拿下最高的光輸出跟覆蓋分數。你想照的是背部、關節跟腿而不只是臉，這片面板就是對的工具。

highlights.title: Hooga HG300 依舊是聰明的省錢首選
highlights.body: 它拿下 9.1 的最高性價比分數，因為它用旗艦幾分之一的價錢就給你堪用的近紅外線輸出。你犧牲的是覆蓋面積跟臨床深度，這筆交易很公道。

en.commentary:
July has been the busiest month this category has seen all year, and the ranking still comes out unchanged. That is a deliberate call. Light Therapy Insiders published a July roundup covering new hardware, a research presentation and a fresh crop of panel reviews, including a detailed evaluation of the Helio Glow panel built around an unusually high share of 1064nm near infrared. Interesting engineering. None of it displaces a device that already has years of measured output behind it.

The theme I keep seeing in this month's coverage is that 2026 is the year red light therapy got smart. Touchscreen dosing controls, app integration, modular panels you bolt together. I like the direction, and I want to be clear about what it changes for buyers, which is convenience. It does not change the biology. The wavelengths that do the work are still roughly 630 to 680 nanometres and 810 to 850 nanometres, and the dose that matters is still irradiance multiplied by time. A touchscreen that tells you the number is a nicer way to reach the same number.

Omnilux Contour Face holds first because it turns that dose calculation into a fixed routine you cannot get wrong. Ten minutes, three times a week, flexible mask, done. Its 9.7 clinical score is the strongest in the table.

PlatinumLED BioMax 600 stays third and remains my pick for anyone treating a body rather than a face. Its 9.6 irradiance and 9.7 coverage are the two highest figures on the board, and full torso sessions are where panels earn their footprint.

Kineon Move Plus Pro at fifth is the specialist worth knowing about. Wrap it on a knee, run it while you watch something, and you get targeted joint dosing that a flat panel cannot match on curved surfaces.

highlights.title: A busy news month that changed no verdicts
highlights.body: Light Therapy Insiders covered new devices, a research presentation and several panel reviews in its July roundup, including the Helio Glow with its unusually high 1064nm content. Novel hardware is worth watching. Rankings move on measured output and clinical data, and this month produced neither for the top ten.

highlights.title: Smart features are convenience, dose is still physics
highlights.body: This year's coverage highlights touchscreen dose controls, app integration and modular panels. That is a genuinely better user experience. The effective dose is still irradiance times exposure time at 630 to 680nm and 810 to 850nm, so buy for output and coverage first and treat the interface as a bonus.

highlights.title: Omnilux wins by making the dose foolproof
highlights.body: Ten minutes, three sessions a week, a flexible mask that holds every LED at a fixed distance. The protocol is short enough that people actually complete it, which is the variable that decides results in practice. Its 9.7 clinical score leads the table.

highlights.title: BioMax 600 owns full-body treatment
highlights.body: 9.6 on irradiance and 9.7 on coverage, both the highest marks here. If your target is shoulders, back or hamstrings rather than your face, this panel delivers a usable dose across a large area in one session and justifies the wall space it takes up.

highlights.title: Kineon Move Plus Pro is the joint specialist
highlights.body: Strapped around a knee or elbow, its laser and LED array wraps a curved surface and puts energy where a flat panel struggles to reach. At 9.0 clinical and 8.8 results it holds fifth, and for anyone treating one specific joint it is the most sensible purchase on this list.

zh-tw.commentary:
七月是這個類別今年最熱鬧的一個月，然後排名一格都沒動。這是我刻意的決定。Light Therapy Insiders 的七月匯整裡有新機、有研究發表、還有一批新的面板評測，其中包括對 Helio Glow 的詳細評估，那台的 1064nm 近紅外光比例高得不尋常。工程上很有趣，但這些都還撼動不了一台已經累積好幾年實測數據的機器。

這個月的報導反覆講一件事，2026 是紅光治療變聰明的一年。觸控劑量控制、App 連動、可以自己拼裝的模組化面板。方向我喜歡，但我想把話說清楚，這些改變的是方便性。生物機制沒有變。真正在做事的波長還是大約 630 到 680 奈米跟 810 到 850 奈米，真正決定效果的劑量還是輻照度乘以時間。觸控螢幕只是用比較舒服的方式帶你走到同一個數字。

Omnilux Contour Face 守第一，因為它把劑量計算變成一套你想做錯都很難的固定流程。十分鐘、一週三次、軟式面罩、結束。它的臨床分數 9.7，全表最高。

PlatinumLED BioMax 600 續留第三，處理身體而不是臉的人，我還是推它。輻照度 9.6、覆蓋 9.7，是整張表最高的兩個數字，整片軀幹一次照完，面板佔的那面牆才算值回票價。

第五名 Kineon Move Plus Pro 是值得認識的專科選手。綁在膝蓋上，追劇的時候順便照，曲面關節的針對性劑量，平板面板真的給不了。

highlights.title: 新聞很多，判斷一個都沒改
highlights.body: Light Therapy Insiders 的七月匯整包含新機、研究發表跟數台面板評測，Helio Glow 那台高比例 1064nm 也在裡面。新硬體值得追蹤。但排名要動，靠的是實測輸出跟臨床資料，這個月前十名兩樣都沒有新東西。

highlights.title: 智慧功能是方便，劑量還是物理
highlights.body: 今年的報導主打觸控劑量、App 連動、模組化面板，使用體驗確實變好了。有效劑量依然是 630 到 680nm 與 810 到 850nm 的輻照度乘上照射時間。所以先看輸出跟覆蓋面積，介面漂亮算加分。

highlights.title: Omnilux 贏在把劑量做成傻瓜流程
highlights.body: 十分鐘、一週三次、軟式面罩讓每顆 LED 距離固定。療程夠短，人才真的會做完，而做不做得完才是實務上決定效果的變數。臨床分數 9.7，全表領先。

highlights.title: BioMax 600 拿下全身照護
highlights.body: 輻照度 9.6、覆蓋 9.7，兩項都是這裡最高。目標是肩膀、背部或大腿後側而不是臉的話，這片面板一次就能在大面積上給到有意義的劑量，佔的牆面才有道理。

highlights.title: Kineon Move Plus Pro 是關節專科
highlights.body: 綁在膝蓋或手肘上，雷射加 LED 陣列直接包住曲面，把能量送進平板面板照不太到的地方。臨床 9.0、效果 8.8，穩在第五。只想處理某一個關節的人，這是清單上最合理的一筆花費。
